data.title: 1inch Expands to Solana, Eyes Cross-Chain DeFi Liquidity
data.description:
Catena, Tuesday, May 13, 2025-1inch, the second-largest decentralized exchange aggregator by trading volume, has launched support for Solana, the company announced Tuesday, deepening its reach in decentralized finance with plans to connect the network to 10 other blockchains via cross-chain swaps. The integration enables users to access 1inch’s Fusion protocol, MEV-protected onchain swaps and six […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/1inch-expands-to-solana-eyes-cross-chain-defi-liquidity

data.title: Bitwise CIO bats for diversified crypto investment, compares Bitcoin to Google
data.description:
Bitwise CIO makes a case for diversified crypto investment in different assets such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and Avalanche. He compares it to 2004, when Google was the leading internet company, though Netflix made the most money for investors in a 21-year period.
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitwise-cio-bats-for-diversified-crypto-investment-compares-bitcoin-to-google/

data.title: Solana Tops All Blockchains in 24-Hour Network Revenue
data.description:

data.title: Kazakhstan Crypto Skyrockets to $1.4B as Nation Targets Central Asia Crypto Dominance
data.description:
Kazakhstan crypto leaders have outlined plans to relax trading limits, license miners, and pair grid upgrades with foreign investors. Volumes at Astana’s finance centre have risen from $324 m to $1. 4 bn, yet 91 % of activity still falls outside oversight, prompting calls for a nationwide framework. The post Kazakhstan Crypto Skyrockets to $1
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/kazakhstan-crypto-skyrockets-1-4b/

data.title: French minister summons crypto bosses after brutal kidnapping attempt
data.description:
France’s interior minister has invited crypto leaders to discuss their security after several attempted and carried out kidnappings of people linked to the industry this year. The meeting follows the latest such incident on Tuesday when armed attackers tried to abduct the daughter and grandson of a crypto entrepreneur in the French capital. Minister calls […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/french-minister-summons-crypto-bosses-after-brutal-kidnapping-attempt/

data.title: Coinbase Finally Settles Dogecoin Sweepstakes Lawsuit
data.description:
Coinbase and a marketing firm have agreed to pay $2,250,000 to settle a class action lawsuit related to a Dogecoin sweepstakes from 2021.
source: https://decrypt.co/319807/coinbase-settles-dogecoin-sweepstakes-lawsuit

data.title: Bitcoin Miners WULF and MARA Trade at 4× Revenue Premiums, IREN Lags
data.description:
On-chain data firm CryptoQuant has identified the Bitcoin addresses of listed miners and has derived intra-month revenue for MARA, WULF, RIOT, HIVE, CORZ, CLSK, BITF, CIPHER and IREN. Annualised figures place WULF and MARA on 4. 4× revenue multiples, while IREN trades at a discount.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-miner-premiums-wulf-mara-iren-discount/

data.title: Dubai Government Announces Partnership With Crypto.com To Accept Payments in Digital Assets
data.description:
Dubai is partnering with the exchange Crypto. com to accept digital assets for government fees. The emirate’s Department of Finance (DOF) signed the memorandum of understanding (MoU) with the crypto firm as part of its ongoing “cashless strategy. ” Dubai aims to conduct more than 90% of financial transactions across both the public and private sectors through […] The post Dubai Government Announces Partnership With Crypto
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/14/dubai-government-announces-partnership-with-crypto-com-to-accept-payments-in-digital-assets/

data.title: Tether Announces QVAC Platform: Revolutionizing Artificial Intelligence Development Via USDT
data.description:

source: https://coinpedia.org/news/tether-announces-qvac-platform-revolutionizing-artificial-intelligence-development-via-usdt/

data.title: Robinhood’s $179 million WonderFi deal could boost revenue by 10%, analyst says
